prompt: A realistic high-angle beach selfie of a young woman standing on bright white sand under harsh midday sunlight, framed from just above the head to the upper thighs in a vertical smartphone composition. She has black hair parted in the center and styled into 2 long braided pigtails, one on each side. Her face is mostly obscured by her raised hand shading her eyes from the sun, creating a candid, slightly anonymous look. She is wearing a fitted ribbed deep V-neck cap-sleeve crop top in pale baby blue and low-rise white bottoms visible at the waist. Her body is slim with a soft, glamorous fashion-photo look. One arm is extended toward the camera holding the phone for the selfie, while the other hand rests across her forehead to block the sunlight. The lighting is extremely bright and washed with soft pale tones, producing delicate skin highlights, gentle shadows, and a clean airy summer aesthetic. Background is a minimal sandy beach with a faint strip of shoreline and water near the top edge, no other people, no props, no buildings. Style should feel like a polished social-media beach selfie, realistic skin texture, subtle retouching, soft pastel color grading, high detail, natural pose, feminine and youthful summer mood.
